theme_archetype.rationale: Fusing Cyberpunk/Neon (Archetype 7) dictated by the user's color constraints with Swiss Brutalist structural authority (Archetype 4) to suit a governmental/legal adjudication tool. This 'Cyber-Bureaucracy' approach balances extreme high-contrast aesthetics with the rigid, organized layouts required for casework.

core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix rigid legal document structures with underground cyberpunk neon accents.
Contrast over Softness: No muddy greys. Pure deepest blacks against electric brights. 1px sharp borders.
Content is King: The chat area and markdown responses must have generous breathing room and flawless typography.
The Terminal Aesthetic: Use raw, flat, border-collapse data grids rather than floating 'soft' cards.

spacing_and_layout.global: h-screen w-screen overflow-hidden bg-background-base flex flex-col text-text-primary
spacing_and_layout.header: h-16 shrink-0 border-b border-borders-subtle bg-background-base flex items-center justify-between px-6 z-50
spacing_and_layout.sidebar_left: w-72 shrink-0 border-r border-borders-subtle bg-background-base flex flex-col
spacing_and_layout.chat_area: flex-1 flex flex-col relative bg-background-surface overflow-hidden
spacing_and_layout.sidebar_right: w-80 shrink-0 border-l border-borders-subtle bg-background-base flex flex-col

surface_strategies.grid_borders: Use border-collapse techniques. Elements should have border-r and border-b with border-white/10 instead of full borders to create a 'blueprint' feel.
surface_strategies.shimmering_border_card: For AI responses or active states: Create a wrapper with relative, p-[1px], overflow-hidden, and rounded-md. Inside, add a spinning gradient div (absolute inset-[-100%] bg-[conic-gradient(from_0deg,transparent_0deg,#00FFD4_90deg,transparent_180deg,#A855F7_270deg)] animate-[spin_4s_linear_infinite]). Above that, place the inner content div with bg-background-surface relative z-10 h-full w-full.

header.logo_area: Flex row, items-center, gap-3. Logo text 'MazZKiLL@' using logo typography rule. App name 'SCSS AB ADVOCATE' in font-mono text-sm tracking-widest text-text-secondary border-l border-white/10 pl-3.
header.model_selector: Flex items-center gap-1 bg-background-surface border border-borders-subtle rounded-full p-1. Buttons for 'Claude Sonnet 4.5' and 'Grok3'. Active state: bg-white/10 text-brand-cyan with a subtle text-shadow. Include a tiny w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-brand-cyan animate-pulse for the active status badge.

sidebar_left.new_session_btn: w-full py-3 border-b border-borders-subtle flex items-center justify-center gap-2 text-brand-cyan font-mono text-sm hover:bg-brand-cyan/10 transition-colors
sidebar_left.session_item: p-4 border-b border-borders-subtle hover:bg-white/5 cursor-pointer flex flex-col gap-1. Active item gets border-l-2 border-brand-cyan bg-white/5.

chat_area.user_message: self-end max-w-[80%] bg-white/5 border border-borders-subtle p-5 rounded-lg font-body text-text-primary
chat_area.ai_message: self-start w-full border border-borders-subtle bg-background-base p-6 rounded-lg font-body leading-relaxed prose prose-invert prose-p:text-text-primary prose-a:text-brand-cyan prose-code:text-brand-purple prose-pre:bg-[#030305] prose-pre:border prose-pre:border-white/10
chat_area.ai_message_generating: Apply the shimmering_border_card strategy to this specific card.
chat_area.inline_citations: Render web search results as small inline tags or blockquotes with border-l-2 border-brand-cyan bg-brand-cyan/5 text-sm p-3 font-mono text-brand-cyan/80
chat_area.input_box: w-full bg-background-surface border border-borders-subtle p-4 text-text-primary focus:border-brand-cyan focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-cyan transition-all resize-none font-body

email_panel.header: p-4 border-b border-borders-subtle font-heading text-sm text-brand-purple flex items-center gap-2 uppercase tracking-widest
email_panel.email_card: p-4 border-b border-borders-subtle hover:bg-white/5 cursor-pointer. Contains metadata (Date, From) in font-mono text-[10px] text-text-secondary, Subject in font-body text-sm text-text-primary truncate

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5. Colors should inherit text color or be specifically set to brand-cyan/brand-purple for accents. NO EMOJIS ALLOWED.

testing_attributes.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all CSS files apply the custom fonts (IBM Plex Sans, Unbounded, JetBrains Mono) from Google Fonts.
Do NOT use standard rounded Shadcn cards. Use flat, sharp rectangles or very slightly rounded (rounded-md) elements with 1px border-white/10 for the 'Control Room Grid' aesthetic.

Implement the 'shimmering border' for the AI generating response using pure Tailwind utility classes: a wrapper with overflow-hidden and p-[1px], containing an absolute inset-[-100%] animate-[spin_4s_linear_infinite] conic gradient background, with the actual card div resting on top.
The logo MUST glow. Use text-brand-cyan and drop-shadow-[0_0_12px_rgba(0,255,212,0.8)].
Maintain strict negative space. Don't cramp the chat area; use generous padding (p-6, p-8).
The UI is a fixed full-screen layout (h-screen, overflow-hidden on body). Scrollable areas should be specific containers (like the chat message list or sidebar session list).
All React code should be in .js extensions as per constraints, not .tsx.
Ensure the UI meets the E1 'Anti-AI' standard by avoiding basic centering and default SaaS blues/greys. Strictly adhere to the pure deep black (#030305) and electric cyan/purple accents.
